name: OIDC (Zitadel)
description: Master key, database and admin passwords for Zitadel identity provider. Optional SMTP entries configure notification e-mail at FirstInstance init (see json/applications/zitadel/application.md). All SMTP fields are user-provided — leave SMTP_HOST empty to skip e-mail setup.

provides.name: ZITADEL_URL
provides.description: Full URL to Zitadel API (e.g. https://zitadel:8443)
